Strength • Health • Longevity

Jo's Program

A practical, gym-friendly plan built around strength, lean muscle, joint health, and confidence. Keep every rep controlled, use stable equipment, and stay in a pain-free range of motion.

Phone home-screen tip
Open this file in Safari or Chrome, then use the browser share menu and choose Add to Home Screen. If a phone will not add a local file, place this HTML file on a simple hosted page or cloud link first, then open that link in the browser.

Exercise Example

Example movement graphic, enlarged for easier viewing.

These are visual examples only. Use the machine, bench, dumbbells, or support option that feels safest and most practical in the gym that day.
